---
title: "control_crw_daily.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../crw.html)

Daily CRW controller; identifies missing daily SST/SSTA outputs and runs the daily worker.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/crw/scripts/control_crw_daily.py >}}
```

:::
